description: Workflow for fetching pets, adding pet entities, and marking completion
name: purrfect_pets_fetch_workflow

transitions.description: Start fetching pets from external API
transitions.end_state_description: Pets have been retrieved from external API
transitions.name: start_fetch_pets

transitions.description: Add each retrieved pet as a separate entity
transitions.name: add_pet_entities
transitions.start_state_description: Pets have been retrieved from external API

transitions.description: Mark fetch operation as complete with timestamp
transitions.end_state_description: Fetch operation has been completed with timestamp
transitions.name: mark_fetch_complete

transitions.description: Process individual pet entity to add fun facts and timestamp
transitions.end_state_description: Individual pet entity processed with fun fact and timestamp
transitions.name: process_pet_entity
transitions.start_state_description: Fetch operation has been completed with timestamp
